EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IPolygon3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that extend the IPolygon2 interface.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("287370CE-B306-4892-8A4C-A7970B132B79")]
public interface IPolygon3 : IPolygon2, IPolygon, IPolycurve, ICurve, IGeometry
